_doc: Default permissions for the background jot worker. Expanded per-invocation by jot.sh's python heredoc. Path anchors follow Claude Code's permission syntax (docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/permissions): // = filesystem absolute, ~ = home, / = project root, bare = cwd-relative. We use // with ${REPO_ROOT} (lstripped of leading / during expansion) so the worker can write to repo-root Todos/ even when its tmux cwd is a subdirectory. The installed copy lives at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/permissions.local.json — edit that file to customise; changes take effect on the next /jot. Do NOT edit this bundled default — it will be overwritten on plugin upgrade.
